title: senecio quaylei
intro: Senecio quaylei, also known as the New Zealand fireweed, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and is part of the daisy family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio quaylei include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and soothing respiratory issues. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
